# NVIDIA Corporation — Form 10-Q Excerpt (synthetic sample)

Filing date: 2026-02-22
Period ended: 2026-01-26
Source: synthetic sample created for the NovaVest Research prototype. Not a real SEC filing — the figures below are illustrative. Used to exercise the ESCALATE path (multiple material risk categories missing from the source).

## Results of operations
Total revenue for the quarter was $39.3 billion, an increase of 78% year over year. Data Center revenue grew 92% to $30.9 billion. Gross margin was 73.6%, up 250 basis points sequentially. Operating margin reached 62.0%.

## Liquidity and capital resources
Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities totaled $43.2 billion at quarter end. Capital returned to shareholders during the quarter was $7.6 billion. The balance sheet remained net cash positive.

## Product highlights
The Blackwell platform reached general availability during the quarter. Hopper-generation systems continued to ship at volume. Enterprise customers in the AI infrastructure segment increased their committed pipeline.

Total revenue for the quarter was $39.3 billion, an increase of 78% year over year. Data Center revenue grew 92% to $30.9 billion. Gross margin was 73.6%, up 250 basis points sequentially. Operating margin reached 62.0%.

Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities totaled $43.2 billion at quarter end. Capital returned to shareholders during the quarter was $7.6 billion. The balance sheet remained net cash positive.

The Blackwell platform reached general availability during the quarter. Hopper-generation systems continued to ship at volume. Enterprise customers in the AI infrastructure segment increased their committed pipeline.
